# OpenAPI Spec Tester - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
A Node.js/TypeScript POC application that takes OpenAPI specifications and generates test requests to APIs.

## Project Setup Progress
- [x] Create .github/copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Scaffold Node.js TypeScript project
- [x] Create OpenAPI parser & test generator
- [x] Install dependencies and verify
- [x] Create development task
- [x] Update README and docs

## Technology Stack
- **Runtime**: Node.js
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **OpenAPI**: swagger-parser, @types/swagger-schema-official
- **HTTP Client**: axios
- **Test Framework**: Jest
- **Linter**: ESLint
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Key Features to Implement
1. Parse OpenAPI/Swagger specifications
2. Generate test requests based on API endpoints
3. Execute HTTP requests to the API
4. Collect and display test results
